text:
1.
                                                                                                                Introduction: This document describes the different components involved in delivering the integration between the API Hub and a LFI. The goal is to give a clear picture of which components exist, how they are used and what is expected to be delivered by each party.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: As defined in the CBUAE Open Finance Standards, the Authorisation flow is the process that a User undergoes to authorise consent for a TPP to access account(s) held at an LFI.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: A simple representation of the authorisation flow is as follows:

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: A User will initiate a consent from a TPP's mobile or web app.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: The User will be redirected to the LFI's mobile or web app to authorise the consent.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: The LFI needs to adapt their mobile and/or web app to receive the redirect and parameters passed over from the TPP.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: The LFI will use the API Hub Authorisation Server to verify the request and the parameters.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: The User will go through SCA (Strong Customer Authentication), review the consent, and authorise/reject it.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: The LFI needs to adapt their mobile and/or web app to display the consent authorisation screens.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: Each consent type will have different information to display to the user.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: All screens and the required UX guideline will be provided as part of the Open Finance Standards.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: The LFI will use the Consent Manager and the Authorisation Server to communicate the outcome of the consent authorisation.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: The User will be redirected back to the TPP's mobile or web app.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: The API Hub will generate the redirect url & access token.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: The TPP will receive an access token to allow appropriate actions under the conditions of the consent on the User's account(s).

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: The Ozone Connect API will be responsible for serving data for action service initiation.

2. Open
                                                                                                                Finance
                                                                                                                Authorisation
                                                                                                                Flow: For a visualisation of this flow please see this figma presentation

3. The
                                                                                                                API Hub: The API Hub is a fully featured Open API platform, developed and maintained by Ozone, which sits between each LFI’s network and the TPPs. It includes a number of components or modules which work together to take away all the complexity from the LFIs in providing an Open Finance API.

3.1 API
                                                                                                                Hub
                                                                                                                Network
                                                                                                                Diagram:

3.1 API
                                                                                                                Hub
                                                                                                                Network
                                                                                                                Diagram:
3.2 Infrastructure: Each LFI will have two environments that will be integrated with the API Hub, Pre-Production and Production.

3.2 Infrastructure: All two-way traffic between the API Hub and the LFI environments will be secured using MTLS. Certificates will be issued by the OFTF, and Ozone will provide one-on-one guidance throughout this process.
3.3 Role of the API Hub: The API Hub will:

3.3 Role of the API Hub: Provide a single industry sandbox which simulates a single LFI, with rich synthetic data and a postman collection for each API request/response defined in the Open Finance Standard.
3.3 Role of the API Hub: Provide each LFI with dedicated Pre-Production and Production API gateways accessible to TPPs.
3.3 Role of the API Hub: Ensure that the externally facing API adheres strictly to the Open Finance Standard, including the FAPI security profile, data model, and API operations for each endpoint.

3.3 Role of the API Hub: Integrate with the Open Finance Trust Framework (OFTF) to ensure that ONLY licensed TPPs can access the APIs and that they can ONLY access API sets within the scope of their licensed role(s).

3.3 Role of the API Hub: Manage the User’s consent, to act as the single source of truth regarding this consent and to ensure that the TPP can only access APIs (for data sharing, service initiation or insurance) within the parameters of this consent.
3.3 Role of the API Hub: Provide the CBUAE with all required reporting regarding usage, availability and performance.
3.3 Role of the API Hub: As a result, LFIs are not required to provide an externally facing API, manage TPP identities or permissions, or handle consent parameters for each API request.
3.4 Sequence Diagrams: The following sequence diagrams explain the interactions between the User, the TPP, the API Hub and the LFI.

3.5 Key API Hub Components: In order to deliver the end to end journey for the User, the following APIs will be deployed.
3.5 Key API Hub Components: The Authorisation Server and Consent Manager is built, deployed and maintained by Ozone. The consumer of these APIs are the LFIs.
3.5 Key API Hub Components: The LFI is expected to build, deploy and maintain screens on their mobile and/or web app to support the Consent Authorisation flow.
3.5 Key API Hub Components: The LFI is expected to build, deploy and maintain the Ozone Connect API for Data Sharing and Service Initiation.

4.1 Introduction: Please refer to the onboarding process documentation for full details of the onboarding process.
4.1 Introduction reference: onboarding process documentation
Pre-production:: PTC needs to be set up and able to access the OFTF Sandbox
Pre-production:: PTC needs register themselves as a user of Nebras Service Desk - see Nebras Interaction Guide: https://openfinanceuae.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/OF/pages/232751177
Pre-production: reference: https://openfinanceuae.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/OF/pages/232751177
Pre-production:: PTC needs to raise a ticket on the Nebras Service Desk requesting to initiate the API Hub onboarding process for pre-production.
Pre-production:: Once a ticket has been raised by the LFI, Nebras will create the following on behalf of the PTC:
Pre-production:: Pre-requisites Questionnaire
Pre-production:: Application Layer Authentication Questionnaire
Pre-production:: Pre-production Environment specific configuration form
Pre-production:: Postman collection form
Production:: PTC needs to be set up and able to access the OFTF Production.

Production:: PTC needs register themselves as a user (if the PTC is different for production) of Nebras Service Desk - see Nebras Interaction Guide: https://openfinanceuae.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/OF/pages/232751177
Production: reference: https://openfinanceuae.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/OF/pages/232751177
Production:: PTC needs to raise a ticket on the Nebras Service Desk requesting to initiate the API Hub onboarding process for production.
Production:: Once a ticket has been raised by the LFI, Nebras will create the following on behalf of the PTC:
Production:: Production Environment specific configuration form
Production::

Production:: See Questionnaires and Configuration Guides section of the API Hub Documentation for samples of these forms. https://openfinanceuae.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/APIHubDocsv8/pages/452363201/Questionnaires+and+Configuration+Guides?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiMWRmYTQwZGM2NzU3NDNiZjhhODMyMTRlMjBlZTFjOTAiLCJwIjoiYyJ9

Production: reference: https://openfinanceuae.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/APIHubDocsv8/pages/452363201/Questionnaires+and+Configuration+Guides?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiMWRmYTQwZGM2NzU3NDNiZjhhODMyMTRlMjBlZTFjOTAiLCJwIjoiYyJ9
4.3 LFI Responsibilities: In summary, LFIs need to do three things:

4.3 LFI Responsibilities: Provide a connection from their own Pre-Production and Production systems into the API Hub’s Pre-Production and Production environments. These connections will be secured using MTLS.
4.3 LFI Responsibilities: Build an integration into the API Hub based on the Ozone Connect API specification.
4.3 LFI Responsibilities: Adapt their own existing web and mobile apps to:
4.3 LFI Responsibilities: accept a redirection from the User into their web/mobile app.
4.3 LFI Responsibilities: provide consent authorisation screen(s) to enable the User to authorise each relevant API request.
4.3 LFI Responsibilities: provide a consent dashboard to allow Users to view or revoke consents.
4.4 LFI and API Hub Integration Lifecycle: LFI and Ozone each deploy environment infrastructure for Pre-Production and Production.
